eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED WEEKLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Alpine, CA; Douglas; Lyon; Storey; Carson City, NV; at 11:44 AM on MAR 27, 2019 Effective until 11:59 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Storey County authorities have issued a required weekly test for Carson City, Douglas County, Storey County, Alpine County, and Lyon County. This is only a test No Action Required
